text.title: Market Research: TAM/SAM/SOM Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: Geography missing (refuses 'global'); ICP unspecified; tam top_down_source + bottom_up_source absent; sam, som, triangulation, som_confidence absent.

list.pattern: TAM derived from one source only.
Geography listed as 'global' instead of explicit country codes.
SOM emitted without a confidence tag.
